frictions.description: Scene lib has stale doc comment referencing TextRun::glyph_count on line 967 — the TextRun struct has been removed but the comment remains
Test count decreased from 1764 (documented in CLAUDE.md) to 1698 due to removal of SVG test file — documentation not yet updated

summary: Tested 29 assertions: all 29 passed. Full test suite (1698 tests) passes with exit code 0. All removed types (TextRun, PathCmd, PathCmdKind, Content::Text, Content::Path, SVG code, icon fields) confirmed absent from source. New content types (FillRect, Glyphs) round-trip correctly through single/double buffers. Compositor has zero content-type knowledge. Node size (96B) and layout constants are unchanged with compile-time assertions verified. Two minor frictions noted: stale TextRun doc comment, outdated test count in docs.
